evals.name: basic-animals-theme
evals.prompt: 给我家幼儿园大班的孩子做一份小动物英语描红卡，6个单词：cat dog pig cow duck fish，主题叫做小动物单词练习。自动补全音标和中文。保存到当前目录。
evals.expected_output: Self-contained HTML file at ./tracing-cards-*.html. Should contain exactly 6 <div class="card"> elements (one per word) and 2 <section class="page"> elements (ceil(6/4)=2). Page header renders '英语描红卡 · 小动物单词练习'. Each card shows emoji + word + IPA + 中文. Each word has 2 ROW_TRACE rows with Hershey <use> references and 2 blank grid rows. Pure offline — no external CSS/JS/font/image URLs.

assertions.text: Generated HTML file exists at the chosen output path
File contains exactly 6 occurrences of '<div class="card">'
File contains exactly 2 occurrences of '<section class="page">'
File contains the theme name '小动物单词练习' in a page header
File contains no external URLs (no 'https://', no 'fonts.googleapis')
File contains <use href="#l-c"> style Hershey references, not Comic Sans <text> elements
Assistant runs the interview flow via AskUserQuestion before generating (word list already provided so that one question is skipped)

evals.name: hard-letter-coverage
evals.prompt: 做一份英语描红卡，测试字母组合：apple, book, green, yellow, banana, flower. 主题：混合练习. 自动补全meaning和phonetic, 默认路径.
evals.expected_output: HTML with 6 cards, 2 pages (ceil(6/4)=2). All words lowercase. Cumulative x offsets must be correct: apple uses half-advances 10+9+9+4+9; book uses 9+10+10+8; green uses 10+6+9+9+10; yellow uses 8+9+4+4+10+11; banana uses 9+10+9+10+9+10; flower uses 7+4+10+11+9+6. No letter should overflow right edge of the viewBox (<= 1000 advance units total).

assertions.text: File contains exactly 6 occurrences of '<div class="card">'
File contains exactly 2 occurrences of '<section class="page">'
File contains '混合练习' in page header
File contains <use href="#l-a"> and <use href="#l-p"> (apple stress)
File contains <use href="#l-w"> (widest letter, yellow/flower)
For each word, the final x offset is less than 1000 - 40 (fits viewBox with right padding)
No x offset is ever 20 or larger than expected — left padding is applied by translate(20,...) not by adding 20 per letter

evals.name: unknown-word-asks-user
evals.prompt: 帮我做英文描红，单词有：rainbow，unicorn，dinosaur。主题：奇幻冒险。音标和中文自动补全。
evals.expected_output: All three words are outside the built-in lexicon, so the assistant should stop and ask the user for emoji/phonetic/meaning rather than fabricate. If the user refuses or doesn't reply, the skill should not hallucinate phonetics/meanings.

assertions.text: Assistant does NOT produce a final HTML file with fabricated phonetic/meaning for rainbow/unicorn/dinosaur
Assistant explicitly asks the user (via AskUserQuestion or a direct question) for the missing lexicon entries
Assistant names the specific words that are missing from the built-in lexicon
Assistant does not invent an IPA phonetic such as a made-up /reɪnˌboʊ/ without user confirmation

evals.name: uppercase-auto-lowercase
evals.prompt: Make me a tracing worksheet for these words: CAT, DOG, APPLE, BOOK. Theme: 'Phonics Practice'. Save in current directory.
evals.expected_output: Assistant should silently lowercase all words (Hershey defs only cover a-z) and mention that uppercase is not supported by the current font before proceeding with cat/dog/apple/book.

assertions.text: File contains <use href="#l-c"> (lowercase c from CAT)
File does NOT reference any uppercase paths like #l-C or #l-A
Assistant mentions in the reply that uppercase A-Z is not available in the current font and input was lowercased
File contains exactly 4 occurrences of '<div class="card">'
File contains exactly 1 occurrence of '<section class="page">' (ceil(4/4)=1)
